rationale: Tests whether cumulative volume-weighted price trends reveal hidden accumulation during extended flat consolidations.
expected_failure_mode: High-volume nodes frequently act as magnets rather than launching pads.
stop_conditions: simple family fails the named-window or parsimony gates
no new family leader improves Future Confidence and Trust
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
Win rate drops below 45% over a 100-trade sample.
